description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian figure with a lean build, standing upright with arms slightly outstretched. The individual is dressed in a fitted short-sleeve t-shirt with a small printed logo or text on the left chest and back, paired with slim-fit pants. The figure wears low-top lace-up sneakers and has a distinctive hairstyle featuring short, thick, twisted locks gathered at the top and back of the head. The face is partially obscured by large, wraparound sunglasses, adding a modern, urban flair. The overall appearance suggests a casual, contemporary style suitable for city streets or parks.
description: A casually dressed adult pedestrian with a modern hairstyle, sunglasses, t-shirt, slim pants, and sneakers, standing upright in a relaxed pose.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sunglasses, t-shirt logo, and relaxed arm position.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, hairstyle, and the fit of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back logo on the t-shirt and the gathered hairstyle.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and clothing fit.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeve t-shirt and slim-fit pants
attribute_hairstyle: short twisted locks gathered at the top and back
